item.title: Apple Deals: AirPods Pro 3
item.description: Apple products and accessories on sale, including AirPods Pro 3

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 Hit Best Price
item.description: AirPods Pro 3 available for $199.99 on Amazon, best price since Prime Day.

item.title: Amazon AirPods Pro 3 $169 Deal Returns for Prime
item.description: Amazon restocked AirPods Pro 3 at $169 ahead of Prime Day. Grab the $80 off now before the next stockout and enjoy premium audio for less today.
